a:r.a:t: Skilled Sales Professional (Blend of New and Existing Business)
HGV TCC is aligned with or above direct competitors and Vacation Ownership benchmarks
, indicating strong competitiveness within its core peer group.
broader industry benchmarks, HGV is showing strong alignment for core selling roles
sales training management roles are falling below the 25
At Director+ levels, HGV remains aligned with direct competitors but shows
less competitive alignment against Vacation Ownership and broader industry benchmarks
. This gap at senior levels may impact the ability to attract and retain top external sales talent.
HGV’s pay mixes are generally aligned to the vacation ownership benchmarks
, with slightly more variable-heavy structures than benchmarks.
When comparing against broader industry, pay mixes at HGV are far more variable-heavy than the market, particularly for
management roles, which are typically aligned to a 70/30 pay structure to ensure focus is on strategy and coaching/development rather than revenue generation

For Training roles, market data indicates these positions are not treated as true sellers in the market. HGV may want to reassess whether the current incentive-heavy structure is driving the intended behaviors for these roles.
